news.title:
Sumeet Bagadia recommends five breakout stocks: Jindal Stainless, Ramkrishna Forgings, NCC, Brigade Enterprises, and Federal Bank.
Nifty rose 1.16% to 24,050.60; Bank Nifty surged 1.99% to 55,912.75, showing bullish momentum.
news.summary:
Sumeet Bagadia recommends five breakout stocks: Jindal Stainless, Ramkrishna Forgings, NCC, Brigade Enterprises, and Federal Bank.
Nifty rose 1.16% to 24,050.60; Bank Nifty surged 1.99% to 55,912.75, showing bullish momentum.

news.title:
Jindal Stainless rose 7.5% from ₹725.4 to ₹779.95, outperforming Sensex's 5.3% gain.
The rise was driven by technical momentum, intraday surge, and mixed indicator signals.
news.summary:
Jindal Stainless rose 7.5% from ₹725.4 to ₹779.95, outperforming Sensex's 5.3% gain.
The rise was driven by technical momentum, intraday surge, and mixed indicator signals.

news.title:
Jindal Stainless ramps up melting capacity to 4.2 mt with new Indonesia melt shop.
Plans include 1.1 mt HRAP and 0.17 mt cold rolling in Odisha by FY27; Rs 900 cr outlay for Hisar, Kharagpur by FY28.
news.summary:
Jindal Stainless ramps up melting capacity to 4.2 mt with new Indonesia melt shop.
Plans include 1.1 mt HRAP and 0.17 mt cold rolling in Odisha by FY27; Rs 900 cr outlay for Hisar, Kharagpur by FY28.

news.title:
Jindal Stainless acquires 4.6% stake in Oyster Green Hybrid One for ₹23.4 crore.
This completes its investment in a hybrid renewable energy project for sustainability.
news.summary:
Jindal Stainless acquires 4.6% stake in Oyster Green Hybrid One for ₹23.4 crore.
This completes its investment in a hybrid renewable energy project for sustainability.

news.title:
Jindal Stainless & Oyster Renewable part-commissioned a 315.6 MW hybrid project in MP, with 115 MW operational.
Project, funded by IREDA, aims to cut 6.5 lakh tonnes CO2 annually; Oyster targets 3.5 GW by 2030.
news.summary:
Jindal Stainless & Oyster Renewable part-commissioned a 315.6 MW hybrid project in MP, with 115 MW operational.
Project, funded by IREDA, aims to cut 6.5 lakh tonnes CO2 annually; Oyster targets 3.5 GW by 2030.

news.title:
JSL Overseas Holding acquired 1.8L shares of Jindal Stainless Ltd, raising its stake to 17.07%.
The market purchase increased total shareholding to 14.07 crore shares, per SEBI SAST norms.
news.summary:
JSL Overseas Holding acquired 1.8L shares of Jindal Stainless Ltd, raising its stake to 17.07%.
The market purchase increased total shareholding to 14.07 crore shares, per SEBI SAST norms.

news.title:
Jindal Stainless and Oyster Renewable progress 315.6 MW hybrid power project for decarbonisation.
The project aims to reduce emissions and enhance clean energy capacity.
news.summary:
Jindal Stainless and Oyster Renewable progress 315.6 MW hybrid power project for decarbonisation.
The project aims to reduce emissions and enhance clean energy capacity.

news.title:
Jindal Stainless commissions 1.2 MTPA melt facility in Indonesia early.
Plans INR 900 cr investment for cold rolled capacity, 3.5 MTPA sales by FY29.
news.summary:
Jindal Stainless commissions 1.2 MTPA melt facility in Indonesia early.
Plans INR 900 cr investment for cold rolled capacity, 3.5 MTPA sales by FY29.

news.title:
JSL Overseas Holding Ltd disclosed acquiring 269,051 shares (0.03%) of Jindal Stainless Ltd via open market.
Post-acquisition, JSL Overseas now holds 17.03% voting rights in Jindal Stainless, up from 17% earlier.
news.summary:
JSL Overseas Holding Ltd disclosed acquiring 269,051 shares (0.03%) of Jindal Stainless Ltd via open market.
Post-acquisition, JSL Overseas now holds 17.03% voting rights in Jindal Stainless, up from 17% earlier.

news.title:
Tata Motors sees shareholder changes; IndiGo imposes fuel surcharge amid rising costs.
Adani Total Gas cuts excess gas prices; Jindal Stainless faces disruptions from Iran conflict.
news.summary:
Tata Motors sees shareholder changes; IndiGo imposes fuel surcharge amid rising costs.
Adani Total Gas cuts excess gas prices; Jindal Stainless faces disruptions from Iran conflict.

news.title:
Jindal Stainless MD highlights adverse process impact due to reliance on industrial gases.
West Asia conflict is identified as the cause of disruptions.
news.summary:
Jindal Stainless MD highlights adverse process impact due to reliance on industrial gases.
West Asia conflict is identified as the cause of disruptions.

news.title:
India faces commercial gas shortages impacting industries like steel, auto components, and food production.
Jindal Stainless warns of cascading effects; firms consider alternatives as costs rise and exports face challenges.
news.summary:
India faces commercial gas shortages impacting industries like steel, auto components, and food production.
Jindal Stainless warns of cascading effects; firms consider alternatives as costs rise and exports face challenges.

news.title:
Jindal Stainless reports West Asia war impacts operations; plants running at rationalised capacity due to fuel disruptions.
Shares of Jindal Stainless fell 5.1% to ₹708.15 on BSE amid supply chain and shipping route challenges.
news.summary:
Jindal Stainless reports West Asia war impacts operations; plants running at rationalised capacity due to fuel disruptions.
Shares of Jindal Stainless fell 5.1% to ₹708.15 on BSE amid supply chain and shipping route challenges.

news.title:
Jindal Stainless faces shipping disruptions, causing vessel changes, delayed cargo, and supply chain issues.
These disruptions are expected to negatively impact Jindal Stainless's profit margins.
news.summary:
Jindal Stainless faces shipping disruptions, causing vessel changes, delayed cargo, and supply chain issues.
These disruptions are expected to negatively impact Jindal Stainless's profit margins.

news.title: Jindal Stainless MD highlights industrial gas supply crunch affecting steel plants.
news.summary: Jindal Stainless MD highlights industrial gas supply crunch affecting steel plants.

news.title: Jindal Stainless warns of potential delays in stainless steel shipments to Middle East.
news.summary: Jindal Stainless warns of potential delays in stainless steel shipments to Middle East.

news.title:
JSL Overseas Holding acquired 803,661 equity shares of Jindal Stainless Ltd via open market.
Post acquisition, JSL Overseas Holding's stake in Jindal Stainless Ltd rose to 16.7% from 16.6%.
news.summary:
JSL Overseas Holding acquired 803,661 equity shares of Jindal Stainless Ltd via open market.
Post acquisition, JSL Overseas Holding's stake in Jindal Stainless Ltd rose to 16.7% from 16.6%.

news.title: Jindal Stainless stock surged over 4% in recent trading.
news.summary: Jindal Stainless stock surged over 4% in recent trading.

news.title:
Jindal Stainless partners with Indian Railways to make stainless steel salt containers.
This marks a milestone in corrosion-free steel use in railway logistics.
news.summary:
Jindal Stainless partners with Indian Railways to make stainless steel salt containers.
This marks a milestone in corrosion-free steel use in railway logistics.

news.title:
Jindal Stainless Ltd announces incorporation of a wholly-owned subsidiary, Jindal Stainless Corporate Management Services Pvt Ltd.
The new entity, incorporated on 12th Feb 2026, will serve as a centralized shared services entity with 100% ownership by Jindal Stainless Ltd.
news.summary:
Jindal Stainless Ltd announces incorporation of a wholly-owned subsidiary, Jindal Stainless Corporate Management Services Pvt Ltd.
The new entity, incorporated on 12th Feb 2026, will serve as a centralized shared services entity with 100% ownership by Jindal Stainless Ltd.
